description: Contributed to a cross-platform mobile application for iOS and Android using React Native and Supabase
Collaborated with the team to clean up and restructure an AI-generated codebase, improving readability, maintainability, and overall code quality
Integrated AI-driven features using Anthropic APIs
Implemented major frontend UI revisions to improve usability and user experience
Optimized search functionality, improving performance and responsiveness for ~1,000 users
Worked closely with frontend and backend teammates to ensure smooth feature integration
